languages.text: "Я не хочу лишать вас верных подданных, Лорд-капитан. Но эти люди — кровососы, а не лекари. Еретики, уничтожающие ваших преданных слуг. Без них будет лучше". {n}На мгновение голос женщины смягчается.{/n}

"I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я не хочу лишать вас верных подданных, Лорд-капитан. Но эти люди — кровососы, а не лекари. Еретики, уничтожающие ваших преданных слуг. Без них будет лучше". {n}На мгновение голос женщины смягчается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

"I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

"I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

languages.text: 「忠実な臣下を奪うことは望んでいません、船長様。しかし、この人たちは癒す者ではなく、血を吸う者です。異端者たちは、忠実な臣下を破壊しています。彼らがいなければ、より良いでしょう。」{n}しばらくの間、女の声は優しくなります。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「忠実な臣下を奪うことは望んでいません、船長様。しかし、この人たちは癒す者ではなく、血を吸う者です。異端者たちは、忠実な臣下を破壊しています。彼らがいなければ、より良いでしょう。」{n}しばらくの間、女の声は優しくなります。{/n}

languages.text: "Sizi sadık kullarınızdan mahrum bırakmak istemem Lord Kaptan. Fakat bu insanlar şifacı değil, kan emici. Sadık hizmetkârlarınızı yok eden kâfirler. Onlar olmadan daha iyi durumda oluruz." {n}Bir an için kadının sesi yumuşuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sizi sadık kullarınızdan mahrum bırakmak istemem Lord Kaptan. Fakat bu insanlar şifacı değil, kan emici. Sadık hizmetkârlarınızı yok eden kâfirler. Onlar olmadan daha iyi durumda oluruz." {n}Bir an için kadının sesi yumuşuyor.{/n}

languages.text: «No deseo arrebatarle a súbditos leales, Lord Capitán, pero estos hombres son chupasangres, no curanderos. Son herejes que destruyen a sus sirvientes fieles. Le irá mejor sin ellos». {n}Por un momento, la voz de la mujer se suaviza.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No deseo arrebatarle a súbditos leales, Lord Capitán, pero estos hombres son chupasangres, no curanderos. Son herejes que destruyen a sus sirvientes fieles. Le irá mejor sin ellos». {n}Por un momento, la voz de la mujer se suaviza.{/n}

languages.text: “我无意让您损失忠诚的子民，舰长大人。但这群吸人血的东西可不是治疗师，而是残害您忠仆的异端。他们消失了会更好。”{n}有那么一瞬，女人的声音柔和了下来。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我无意让您损失忠诚的子民，舰长大人。但这群吸人血的东西可不是治疗师，而是残害您忠仆的异端。他们消失了会更好。”{n}有那么一瞬，女人的声音柔和了下来。{/n}

languages.text: « Mon intention n'est pas de vous priver de vos loyaux sujets, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, mais ces gens sont des bouchers, pas des soigneurs. Des hérétiques qui détruisent vos fidèles serviteurs. Le monde se portera mieux sans eux, » {n}termine-t-elle d'une voix plus douce.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Mon intention n'est pas de vous priver de vos loyaux sujets, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, mais ces gens sont des bouchers, pas des soigneurs. Des hérétiques qui détruisent vos fidèles serviteurs. Le monde se portera mieux sans eux, » {n}termine-t-elle d'une voix plus douce.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich will Euch keine treuen Untertanen wegnehmen, Lord Captain. Aber diese Leute sind Blutsauger, keine Heiler. Ketzer, die Eure loyalen Diener zerstören. Es ist besser, wenn sie nicht mehr da sind." {n}Für einen Augenblick wird die Stimme der Frau sanfter.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich will Euch keine treuen Untertanen wegnehmen, Lord Captain. Aber diese Leute sind Blutsauger, keine Heiler. Ketzer, die Eure loyalen Diener zerstören. Es ist besser, wenn sie nicht mehr da sind." {n}Für einen Augenblick wird die Stimme der Frau sanfter.{/n}
